name: chat_stream
description: Stream a conversational AI reply from a message history. Returns plain text.

messages.description: Conversation history. Each item has a 'role' ('user' or 'assistant') and 'content' (string).

systemPrompt.description: Optional system-level instruction that sets the assistant's persona, role, or constraints.

language.description: Reply language. If omitted, matches the language of the last user message.

output.description: The assistant reply as plain text.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
